name: Chick Peas Italiano
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Onions, chopped in large chunks
1 1/2 cups Green pepper, chopped in large chunks
1 lb Chick peas, canned, rinsed and drained
1 lb Tomatoes, canned, undrained and chopped
8 oz Tomato sauce, salt free or regular
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions, green pepper, and garlic. Cook until onions are lightly browned, 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients, mixing well. Cover, reduce heat to low, and cook 20 minutes.
4. Spoon over noodles or rice.
Per serving: 202 cal; 7 g prot; 7 g fat; 29 g carb; 340 mg sod; 0 chol
